title: elaeocarpus nodosus
intro: Elaeocarpus nodosus, also known as the sea hawthorn, is a tropical plant species native to the coastal regions of the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus nodosus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine.
